name: xero
description: Reads and writes Xero Accounting API resources through declarative JSON bundle streams and typed write actions.

risk.read: external Xero Accounting API read of financial, contact, report, attachment-metadata, history, and organisation data
risk.write: creates, updates, emails, sets up, and deletes Xero Accounting API resources in the connected tenant
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; delete actions are marked destructive
